title: acer nigrum var. floridanum
intro: Acer nigrum var. floridanum, also known as Florida black cherry or black chokeberry, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Acer nigrum var. floridanum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used as a food ingredient in jams, jellies, and wines.
